title: 螣 蟺蔚蟻委 螕蔚蠅蟻纬喂魏蠋谓 螞喂蟺伪蟽渭维蟿蠅谓 螡蠈渭慰蟼 (螝螘桅.26)

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 1: 危蠀vo蟺蟿喂魏蠈蟼 蟿委蟿位o蟼
provisions.content: 1. O 蟺伪蟻蠋v 螡蠈渭o蟼 胃伪 伪v伪蠁苇蟻畏蟿伪喂 蠅蟼 o 蟺蔚蟻委 螕蔚蠅蟻纬喂魏蠋v 螞喂蟺伪蟽渭维蟿蠅v 螡蠈渭o蟼.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 2: Interpretation
螁蟻胃蟻慰 3: 螤蠋位畏蟽喂蟼 位喂蟺维蟽渭伪蟿o蟼
provisions.content:
3. 螣蠀未苇v 蟺蟻蠈蟽蠅蟺ov 胃伪 蟺蠅位萎 萎 蔚魏胃苇蟿畏 蟺蟻o蟼 蟺蠋位畏蟽喂v o喂ov未萎蟺o蟿蔚 位委蟺伪蟽渭伪 蔚魏蟿蠈蟼-
(伪) 蔚维v 蔚委v伪喂 蔚v蟿蠈蟼 蟽维魏魏蠅v 蠁蔚蟻蠈v蟿蠅v 蔚蟺伪蠀蟿蠋v 魏伪胃伪蟻蠋蟼 魏伪喂 蔚蠀伪v伪纬v蠋蟽蟿蠅蟼 蟿o喂伪蠉蟿伪 蟽畏渭蔚委伪 魏伪喂 魏伪蟿维 蟿o喂o蠉蟿ov 蟿蟻蠈蟺ov 蠅蟼 蟿o 违蟺o蠀蟻纬喂魏蠈v 危蠀渭尾o蠉位喂ov 萎胃蔚位蔚 未喂维 魏伪vov喂蟽渭蠋v 魏伪胃o蟻委蟽蔚喂.
(尾) 蔚维v 蟿o 蔚v 位蠈纬蠅 位委蟺伪蟽渭伪 魏伪喂 o喂 蟺蔚蟻喂苇蠂ov蟿蔚蟼 蟿o蠉蟿o 蟽维魏魏o喂 苇蠂蠅蟽喂v 蔚蟺喂胃蔚蠅蟻畏胃萎 蠀蟺蠈 螘蟺喂胃蔚蠅蟻畏蟿o蠉 魏伪蟿维 蟿o喂o蠉蟿ov 蟿蟻蠈蟺ov 蠅蟼 蟿o 违蟺o蠀蟻纬喂魏蠈v 危蠀渭尾o蠉位喂ov 萎胃蔚位蔚 未喂维 魏伪vov喂蟽渭蠋v 魏伪胃o蟻委蟽蔚喂:
螡o蔚委蟿伪喂 蠈蟿喂 o 违蟺o蠀蟻纬蠈蟼 螘渭蟺o蟻委o蠀 魏伪喂 螔喂o渭畏蠂伪v委伪蟼 未蠉v伪蟿伪喂, 蔚v 蟿畏 未喂伪魏蟻喂蟿喂魏萎 伪蠀蟿o蠉 蔚尉o蠀蟽委伪, v伪 蔚蟺喂蟿蟻苇蠄畏 蔚纬纬蟻维蠁蠅蟼 魏伪喂 蠀蟺蠈 蟿o喂o蠉蟿o蠀蟼 蠈蟻o蠀蟼 蠋蟼 萎胃蔚位蔚v o蟻委蟽蔚喂, 蟿畏v 蟺蠋位畏蟽喂v o喂o蠀未萎蟺o蟿蔚 位喂蟺维蟽渭伪蟿o蟼, 蠂ov未蟻喂魏蠋蟼 萎 位蔚喂伪v喂魏蠋蟼, 苇蟽蟿蠅 魏伪喂 蔚维v 蟿o 位委蟺伪蟽渭伪 未蔚v 蔚蠀蟻委蟽魏畏蟿伪喂 蔚喂蟼 蟽维魏魏o蠀蟼 蠅蟼 蟺蟻o伪v蔚蠁苇蟻胃畏.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 4: Analysis
provisions.content:
4. The analyst or a sampler may take a sample from any fertilizer for analysis. The analyst or sampler may seal up or otherwise secure the whole or a part of the fertilizer from which the sample is taken pending the completion of the analysis of the sample, and the owner or person in possession of such fertilizer shall retain the same so sealed up or otherwise secured by the analyst or sampler and shall not tamper with the fertilizer or any seal thereon:
Provided that the analysis shall be completed within twenty days from the taking of the sample; and if the analysis be not completed within twenty days as aforesaid, the owner or person in possession may sell or otherwise dispose of the fertilizer from which the sample was taken.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 5: Penalty for tampering with sack or contents
provisions.content: 5. Any person tampering with any sack containing fertilizer or with any mark placed upon any sack or in any way mixing or altering any fertilizer in any sack shall be liable to imprisonment for the period of six months or to a fine of ,450 or both such punishments, and any sacks or fertilizer contained therein in respect to which the offence shall be committed shall be liable to be confiscated.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 6: Purchaser may obtain analysis by analyst
provisions.content: 6. Any purchaser of any fertilizer shall be entitled, on the payment of the prescribed fee, to have it analysed by the analyst and to receive from him a certificate of the result of his analysis.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 7: Form of certificate of analysis
provisions.content: 7. The analyst' s certificate of analysis shall be in the form set forth in the Schedule hereto or to the like effect.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 8: Analyst' s certificate to be prima facie evidence
provisions.content: 8. At the hearing of any charge of an offence under this Law or any Regulations made thereunder the production of the certificate of the analyst shall be sufficient evidence of the facts therein stated, unless the person charged shall require that the analyst shall be called as a witness.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 9: Penalty for breach of Law
provisions.content: 9. Any person committing a breach of or failing to comply with the provisions of this Law or of any Regulations made thereunder for which no penalty is prescribed or obstructing any official carrying into effect this Law or any Regulations made thereunder shall be liable to a fine not exceeding ,500 and any sacks or fertilizer in respect of which the offence shall be committed shall be liable to be confiscated.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 10: Reward to informers
provisions.content: 10. Upon the conviction of any person on any charge for an offence under this Law or any Regulations made thereunder the Court before whom the charge has been heard may make any order that the Court may think fit awarding the whole or any portion of any fine to be paid to the person on whose information the charge has been laid.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 11: Regulations

definitions.definition: the Government Analyst or any person appointed by the Governor to act as analyst under the Director of Commerce and Industry for the purposes of this Law
a sack or other receptacle used for containing any fertilizer
any person appointed by the Governor to act as sampler for the purposes of this Law
